must_find.label: explicit incomplete declaration
must_find.pattern: INCOMPLETE\.|No unconditional closure is declared in this repository\.

must_find.label: explicit theorem missing marker
must_find.pattern: No theorem-level proof is currently present in this repository\.|proof sketch only

must_find.label: open frontier markers present
must_find.pattern: Formally conditional on RA1n|Formally open at the shell-product moment frontier|No theorem-level proof is currently present in this repository|\bOpen\.

forbid_mixed_states.label: simultaneous incomplete and complete markers in DDYO frontier scope
forbid_mixed_states.open_pattern: No theorem-level proof is currently present in this repository|Formally conditional on RA1n|Formally open at the shell-product moment frontier|\bOpen\.|proof sketch only|INCOMPLETE\.
forbid_mixed_states.closed_pattern: Unconditional closure achieved|Completion status:\s*COMPLETE|Theorem-level proof complete|\bVERIFIED\b|QED
